entries.label: Asset Accessible for Survey (submit deficiency log if asset not accessible)
Wet Pond – Permanently holds water when functioning as designed and not in a drought
Dry Pond – Temporarily holds stormwater and releases it slowly to prevent flooding
Infiltration Basin – Designed to soak stormwater directly into the ground, recharging groundwater and reducing runoff (not functioning properly if holding water longer than designed)
Sand Filter – Use a constructed layer of sand to filter out pollutants
Bioretention – Utilize a combination of vegetation and engineered media to remove pollutants from stormwater runoff
